name: Prosciutto with Figs and Melon
recipeInstructions:
1. Take six of the figs and slice them into six even wedges.
2. Dust the wedges lightly with thyme.
3. Thin the honey with warm water.
4. Dip the prosciutto slices in the mixture.
5. Cut the prosciutto into 1/4-inch strips.
6. Wrap each strip of prosciutto around a thyme-coated fig wedge.
7. Cut the remaining figs into six wedges and arrange them on chilled salad plates with the ham-wrapped figs and melon slices.
Note: If good melon is not available, substitute fresh berries or other fruits.
